associationLetter.title: Suggested Letter to Hotels
associationLetter.subject: Suggested subject: Exclusive opportunity for members: advance income, higher occupancy and no low seasons
associationLetter.content:
Dear hotel member,

From [Association Name], we are pleased to share with you that we have negotiated and secured an excellent strategic alliance with Hotel Living.
This achievement represents a great opportunity for our hotel community, as it will transform the hotel occupancy of our affiliates, generating higher income and helping to overcome seasonality.

What does Hotel Living offer to your hotel?

🟣 Medium and long stays (8, 15, 22 or 29 days) that fit perfectly in available rooms.

🟣 Highly profitable model, designed to take advantage of rooms whose fixed costs are already covered.

🟣 Immediate income: the hotel charges 5% of the total reservation at the time of booking as a non-refundable guarantee.

🟣 Remaining 85% at check-in, directly from the guest.

🟣 No other added commission: 90% of the reservation payment is paid directly to the hotel.

🟣 Total flexibility: you choose when to participate, which rooms to offer and on which dates.

🟣 Access to a new community of clients who value extended stays, tranquility and flexibility.

Exclusive benefits for joining through our association

✅ Preferential positioning in results.
✅ Guaranteed publication within a maximum of 48 hours.
✅ Visual highlighting on the platform.
✅ Automatic participation in local campaigns.
✅ Official "allied hotel" label.
✅ Right to direct communication with the Hotel Living team.
✅ Inclusion in promotional raffles.
✅ Personalized assistance in the registration process.
✅ Free review of your hotel profile.
✅ Priority translation of your profile to other languages.
✅ Cumulative benefit if you refer other hotels (non-associated).
✅ Early access to new Hotel Living system modules.
✅ Possibility to test functionalities before their official launch.
✅ Priority attention in technical support and incident resolution.
✅ Free access to exclusive training on long-stay optimization and revenue management for your team.
✅ A personalized monthly mention or publication (rotating).

To activate these conditions, it is mandatory that when registering you enter the following association code:

👉 Register at: contact@hotel-living.com

Sincerely,
[Name of responsible person]
[Position]
[Association Name]
